name: software-design-philosophy
description: Manage software complexity through deep modules, information hiding, and strategic programming. Use when the user mentions "module design", "API too complex", "shallow class", "complexity budget", "strategic vs tactical", "deep module", "information leakage", "pass-through method", "this code is over-engineered", "too many layers", "the abstraction isnt worth it", or "simplify this design". Also trigger when reviewing an interface for simplicity, evaluating whether an abstraction is pulling its
author: wondelai
